infos.name: 小区投放点
infos.desc:
You find yourself in a 小区投放点. An usual kind of place.

 You make out a food waste bin.[if c_1 is open and there is something in the c_1] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_1].[end if][if c_1 is open and the c_1 contains nothing] The food waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You make out a recyclable bin.[if c_3 is open and there is something in the c_3] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_3].[end if][if c_3 is open and the c_3 contains nothing] What a letdown! The recyclable bin is empty![end if] You can make out a hazardous waste bin. You wonder idly who left that here.[if c_5 is open and there is something in the c_5] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_5].[end if][if c_5 is open and the c_5 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] You can make out an other waste bin.[if c_7 is open and there is something in the c_7] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_7].[end if][if c_7 is open and the c_7 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if]

There is an unblocked exit to the west.

infos.name: 家中
infos.desc:
Guess what, you are in a place we're calling a 家中.

 You make out a food waste bin.[if c_0 is open and there is something in the c_0] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_0].[end if][if c_0 is open and the c_0 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You make out a recyclable bin.[if c_2 is open and there is something in the c_2] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_2].[end if][if c_2 is open and the c_2 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You can make out [if c_4 is locked]a locked[else if c_4 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] normal looking hazardous waste bin right there by you.[if c_4 is open and there is something in the c_4] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_4]. There's something strange about this thing being here, but you don't have time to worry about that now.[end if][if c_4 is open and the c_4 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can see an other waste bin.[if c_6 is open and there is something in the c_6] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_6].[end if][if c_6 is open and the c_6 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if]

You don't like doors? Why not try going east, that entranceway is unblocked.

rooms.name: 家中
rooms.description: 日常垃圾散落在桌面和地上。

targets.name: 塑料瓶
targets.tip: 塑料瓶应投放到可回收物。

targets.name: 荧光灯管
targets.tip: 荧光灯管应投放到有害垃圾。

targets.name: 胶带
targets.tip: 胶带应投放到其他垃圾。

targets.name: 茶叶渣
targets.tip: 茶叶渣应投放到厨余垃圾。

targets.name: 油漆桶
targets.tip: 油漆桶应投放到有害垃圾。

walkthrough: insert plastic bottle into recyclable bin
insert fluorescent tube into hazardous waste bin
insert packing tape into other waste bin
insert tea leaves into food waste bin
insert paint bucket into hazardous waste bin

objective: 把垃圾投放到正确类别：塑料瓶→可回收物、荧光灯管→有害垃圾、胶带→其他垃圾、茶叶渣→厨余垃圾、油漆桶→有害垃圾
